content.en:
"Just one step away from completely controlling the physical body 365 times, reaching the true ultimate of physical body control!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He continued to condense the copy body, let the copy body induce the evolution characteristics, and deduce the control of the physical body.

Soon, Ye Tian carried out hundreds of evolutions, and finally completed this last step.

Rumble!!!!!

The flesh has finally reached the point of perfect control.

At this moment, Ye Tian was enough to exert 365 times the power of his physical body.

A sense of complete control permeated, and at this moment, Ye Tian could break the extreme of the invincible domain body at any time and carry out the first invincible domain body transformation.

"Then transform!"

Ye Tianyinian manipulated the endless cells of the physical body, each cell could be called the world.

The infinite world evolves at any time under Ye Tian's mind.

Bang!!!!

The invincible domain body has metamorphosed, and it has transformed towards the levelless domain body.

Click!

Ye Tian's body instantly shattered into countless particles, each of which was equivalent to a world.

After these particles transformed and became more powerful, they combined again into Ye Tian's body.

This moment seems to have passed for a long time, but in fact it has only passed in an instant.

At this time, Ye Tian had already completed the first transformation of the invincible domain body, and after nine transformations, he would evolve into a topless domain body.

This process is inevitable, but it will take a long time.

After Ye Tian completed the first transformation of the invincible domain body, he frantically swallowed all kinds of energy to supplement the transformation needs of the invincible domain body.

Ye Tian took out all kinds of holy medicines, forbidden crystals, and origin spring water......

With the supply of a large amount of resources, Ye Tian's invincible domain body finally absorbed enough energy and completely stabilized.

And at this moment, Ye Tian's physical strength skyrocketed several times again.

This is still just one Invincible Domain Body Transformation, his strength has increased a lot, if he completes nine Invincible Domain Body Transformations, how terrifying should his strength be?

The transformation of the invincible domain body can be cultivated step by step, and the reason why it takes a long time is because he needs to regain control of the physical body.

Because his physical body has skyrocketed several times and has undergone a metamorphosis, he can no longer control his physical body by 365 times, and will drop to a level of more than 20 times, so he needs to regain control of his physical body, which will take time.

Once he regains control to a 365-fold level, he can complete the second Invincible Domain Body Transformation.

In this way, until the ninth invincible domain body metamorphosis.

Of course, since he had controlled the perfect control of the physical body 365 times before, if he regained control, the speed would be much faster than before.

Therefore, for the Invincible Domain Ancestor who broke the transformation of the Invincible Domain Body, he only needed to boil slowly before he could step into the realm of the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

"I have a Derivation Ability, so I can complete the transformation of the Invincible Domain Body more quickly!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He didn't have much to do now, so he continued to retreat and regain control of his physical body.

......

When Ye Tian was in retreat, the Xuanxu Holy Realm was still growing, and a large number of holy relics were born, because the human race completely controlled the Xuanxu Holy Realm and did not allow outsiders to enter, so the domain ancestors outside the human race did not know the situation of the Xuanxu Holy Realm at all.

A large number of holy relics were born in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and even holy medicines, saint-grade ore veins, and ancestral relics were born.

Under such circumstances, the Terran Domain Ancestor was very puzzled.

Now, the Terran Domain Ancestor is also in contact with the outside world, so he also knows the situation of the general Holy Realm, and the speed and quantity of resources in the Xuanxu Saint Realm far surpass that of other Saint Realms, which is too abnormal.

However, they didn't ask, but buried this doubt in their hearts, which was a good thing for the Terrans anyway.

Moreover, the Terran has a large number of Star Soul Sands, and more and more Terran Supreme Domain Ancestors have impacted the Invincible Domain Ancestor realm.

After a long period of cultivation, the Terran Race's Invincible Domain Ancestors have now reached thousands of them, and they are still increasing.

In addition, the growth rate of those saints of the human race is also very fast, and they have already stepped into the realm of the strongest domain ancestor, and they have also become the first-grade supreme domain ancestor, and they are about to be promoted to the level of combat power of the supreme domain ancestor on the supreme list.

These saints are what Ye Tian values more, and they have the hope of stepping into the second-step invincible domain ancestor or even the one-step invincible domain ancestor in the future, so that they can be qualified to become the foundation of the human race, and no matter how many ordinary invincible domain ancestors there are, it is useless.

For example, in the Qingyuan Holy Land, there are many invincible domain ancestors, and he can kill them all with a single thought.

Therefore, only a large number of strong people can enhance the strength of the human race and deter others, but ordinary invincible domain ancestors cannot do deterrence.

He often retreats in the future, so the Terrans still need to rely on those powerful invincible domain ancestors.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of millions of years have passed.

this day.

There was a violent tremor in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and in order to prevent accidents, someone summoned Ye Tian.

Ye Tian came out directly from the Holy Monument World.

"Husband!"

Xiao Yue appeared by Ye Tian's side.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue also came.

"Father, what happened?" Ye Xingchen wondered.

"I don't know yet!"

Ye Tian frowned.

Although he was the Lord of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, he had just come out and had not had time to check the situation.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's consciousness covered the entire Xuanxu Holy Realm, perceiving the changes in the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Soon, he probed the cause of the shock of the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian saw that a source was being born somewhere, and that place was forming a world.

"Forbidden Ancestral Spring!"

Seeing this ancestral spring, Ye Tian's expression was shocked.

The Forbidden Ancestral Spring is not an ordinary thing, this is something that even the Ancestral Realm may not necessarily be born.

For example, there is no Forbidden Ancestral Spring in the Battle Ancestor Realm, but the Forbidden Ancestral Realm of the Forbidden Holy Gate has a Forbidden Ancestral Spring.

Among the Ancestral Realms of the Ten Great Holy Gates, only five Ancestral Realms possessed the Forbidden Ancestral Spring.

The Forbidden Ancestral Spring is of little personal use, but for a force, the value is very high.

The Forbidden Spring Water born from the Forbidden Ancestral Spring can help a Domain Ancestor easily ascend to the Supreme Domain Ancestor realm, and it will also help to refine the domain body and refine the strength in the body.

But the greatest use of the Forbidden Ancestral Spring is not this, but to save one's life from death!

In the core of the Forbidden Ancestral Spring, a special forbidden energy can be born, which can keep people immortal, and you can practice all kinds of dangerous holy bodies and secret techniques in it.

Of course, once you cultivate this, it will be difficult to recover from death, but if you cultivate an ordinary holy body, even if you die, you can recover again, and there are no sequelae at all.

Therefore, with the Forbidden Ancestral Spring, a large number of top Eucharistic disciples could be born.

The only pity is that the special energy of the Forbidden Ancestral Spring is limited, and it can accommodate at most a few people at a time, but after a long period of accumulation, a force will give birth to a large number of genius disciples with terrifying strength.

Therefore, the Forbidden Ancestral Spring is too precious!
